## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run api:test` passes (if API code changed)
- [ ] `openapi/openapi.yaml` updated (if endpoints or auth changed)
- [ ] Web/mobile clients updated (if API contract or JWT claims changed)
- [ ] Flyway migration added (if schema changed) — no edits to applied migrations
- [ ] Docker verified (`npm run docker:health`) if API/Docker/compose changed
- [ ] ADR added under `docs/decisions/` (if architectural decision)
